metadata.description: Full UV transformation - location, rotation, scale with 3D support

summary: Transforms UV coordinates (or any Vector3) with Location, Rotation, and Scale. Blender operates in 3D; Unity typically uses 2D UV but supports equivalent transforms.

implementation.approach: Decompose into separate math nodes or use custom function
implementation.option_2: Custom function with rotation matrix math
implementation.option_3: TilingAndOffset node (handles Location+Scale but not rotation)

typical_use: UV animation, texture scrolling, tiling patterns, rotation effects
compatibility_loss_10_percent: 3D rotation on 2D UV space requires projection; minor precision in very large rotations
